title: [A Frozen Battlefield, Trench]
description: The wind howls with menace above, but finds itself unable to gain entrance to the deep battlement.  The stone-reinforced walls are covered with slick ice, and what might have granted sanctuary long ago seems nothing more than an icy prison now.

wayto.3262: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'east'
